title: Feature Request : Move Mirror Column Data from One board to another

posts.author: Guruprasad (Guruprasad Shenoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
An option to move mirror column data from source board to destination board

Use Case :
i have three boards Board 1 , board 2 and Board 3 , i am currently mirroring values from board 1 in Board 2 now i want to move the values from board 2 to board 3 through automation

Regards,
Guru
